name: wechat-publisher
description: Rewrite legal WeChat articles, generate no-text covers, and publish drafts to WeChat Official Account.

interface.shortDescription: 改写法律文章并推公众号草稿
interface.longDescription: A local plugin for the daily legal WeChat workflow: rewrite for clients, generate a no-text atmosphere cover, and publish to the Yang Butou WeChat draft box.
defaultPrompt: Use this plugin to turn a legal source article into a WeChat draft with a no-text cover.
Rewrite this criminal-law article for clients and push it to the WeChat draft box.
Run the daily WeChat workflow for this article.
